basic_details.job_title: UKMSSB Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Uttarakhand Medical Service Selection Board (UKMSSB) Assistant Professor (Statistician) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website www.ukmssb.org. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 27 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-Servicemen/PWD/Freedom Fighter dependents as per Uttarakhand government orders.

qualification.education_qualification: As per latest NMC-TEQ Regulations - Minimum qualifications for teachers in Medical Institutions Regulations 30 June 2025
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Statistician): As per latest NMC-TEQ Regulations - Minimum qualifications for teachers in Medical Institutions Regulations 30 June 2025

selection_process: Paper Publication Experience Additional Educational Qualification Viva
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UKMSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the UKMSSB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor (Statistician): As per latest NMC-TEQ Regulations - Minimum qualifications for teachers in Medical Institutions Regulations 30 June 2025

content_sections.heading: UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 27 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-Servicemen/PWD/Freedom Fighter dependents as per Uttarakhand government orders.

content_sections.heading: UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Paper Publication Experience Additional Educational Qualification Viva

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UKMSSB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) posts is 15-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor (Statistician) post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 27 years and the maximum age limit is 45 years for the Assistant Professor (Statistician) post. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for the General/OBC category?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories is Rs. 2000. SC/ST candidates are required to pay Rs. 1000.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor (Statistician) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67700 - 208700 Per Month, which is Level-11.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor (Statistician) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Assistant Professor (Statistician) post announced by the Uttarakhand Medical Service Selection Board (UKMSSB).

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The qualification required is as per the latest NMC-TEQ Regulations - Minimum qualifications for teachers in Medical Institutions Regulations 30 June 2025.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the UKMSSB Assistant Professor (Statistician) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Paper Publication, Experience, Additional Educational Qualification, and Viva.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification is for Uttarakhand Medical Service Selection Board, so it is advisable to check the official notification for domicile requirements or eligibility for candidates from other states.

faq.question: Q9. How can I correct mistakes in my application form?
faq.answer: An edit/correction window will be available from 17-07-2026 to 20-07-2026 for candidates to make necessary corrections in their submitted application forms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
